center.name: Matobo National Park
center.summary: Matobo National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cape batis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to South Africa, Eswatini, the Matobos and Eastern Highlands of Zimbabwe and adjacent Mozambique

links.evidence: It is native to South Africa, Eswatini, the Matobos and Eastern Highlands of Zimbabwe and adjacent Mozambique
